message:
✨ Add GPU health CronJob management to GPU Node Health Monitor (#1169)

Add ability to install, monitor, and uninstall GPU health check CronJobs
per cluster directly from the GPU Node Health Monitor card.

Backend:
- Add GPUHealthCronJobStatus struct and constants
- Add GetGPUHealthCronJobStatus() for checking existing CronJob state
- Add InstallGPUHealthCronJob() creating SA, ClusterRole, CRB, and CronJob
- Add UninstallGPUHealthCronJob() for clean removal of all resources
- Add RBAC check via SelfSubjectAccessReview before exposing actions
- Add GET/POST/DELETE /api/mcp/gpu-nodes/health/cronjob routes

Frontend:
- Add GPUHealthCronJobStatus type
- Add useGPUHealthCronJob() hook with status/install/uninstall actions
- Add CronJob management panel with per-cluster status display
- Add install dialog with configurable namespace and schedule
- Add uninstall confirmation flow
- Show job statistics (active/succeeded/failed) when installed
- RBAC-aware: only show install/uninstall to users with permissions

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
